analysis_request.requirements: A sleek iPhone case made of biodegradable material, featuring a dynamic iridescent liquid metal surface that shifts colors gently, reflecting daily mood changes. Soft pastel gradients merging with futuristic holographic patterns, elegant and tech-forward, minimalistic design with a subtle glossy finish. Product photography style, soft studio lighting, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed, clean white background.

images.title: The Future of Fluid Protection
images.description: A high-angle hero shot showcasing the iridescent liquid metal texture of the iPhone case against a clean, minimalist backdrop.
images.design_content:
## Image [1]: The Future of Fluid Protection

**Design Goal**: A high-angle hero shot showcasing the iridescent liquid metal texture of the iPhone case against a clean, minimalist backdrop.

**Product Appearance**: The subject in this image must stay strictly consistent with the same SKU and product from the reference image. The product appearance should match the uploaded product; the true dominant color is Iridescent Pearl (#D9D3F8); the material is biodegradable liquid-metal shell; Key features include precise camera cutouts, slim-fit profile, reflective holographic finish.

**In-Graphic Elements**:
- Decorative elements: floating glass-like spheres and subtle light refraction streaks that reinforce the hero selling point.
- Unified style direction: futuristic minimal / soft rim light / centered hero composition
- Safe whitespace: keep roughly 30%-40% usable negative space for typography or breathing room without crowding the product.

**Composition Plan**:
- Product Proportion: product occupies roughly 65% of the frame
- Layout Method: central vertical alignment with a dynamic 15-degree tilt
- Text Area: reserve the top-left safe zone for headline and the lower-center zone for support copy without covering the product

**Content Elements**:
- Focus of Display: the interplay of soft pastel gradients across the liquid metal surface
- Key Selling Points: biodegradable material, iridescent finish, holographic pattern
- Background Elements: pure white studio floor with a soft diffused shadow and minimalist white backdrop
- Decorative Elements: subtle rainbow flares, glass-like spheres, and restrained refraction details

**Text Content** (Using English):
- Main Title: Dynamic Iridiscence
- Subtitle: Shifting colors to match your daily mood.
- Description Text: Crafted from premium biodegradable materials with a futuristic holographic finish.

**Atmosphere Creation**:
- Mood Keywords: Futuristic, Ethereal, Sophisticated, Sustainable
- Light and Shadow Effects: soft top-down key light with lavender and soft cyan rim light, shallow depth, crisp material highlights

blueprint.design_specs:
# Overall Design Specifications

> All images must follow the unified specifications below to ensure visual consistency

## Color System
- Primary Color: Iridescent Pearl (a shifting spectrum of soft cyan, magenta, and lavender)
- Secondary Color: Holographic Silver for high-tech accents and edge highlights
- Background Color: Pure Minimalist White (#FFFFFF)

## Font System
- Heading Font: Helvetica Neue Light or similar sans serif
- Body Font: Inter Regular
- Hierarchy: Heading:Subtitle:Body = 3:1.8:1

## Visual Language
- Decorative Elements: soft-edged geometric shapes, floating glass-like spheres, and subtle liquid-metal ripples
- Icon Style: ultra-thin linear icons with a slight metallic gradient
- Negative Space Principle: high utilization of white space to emphasize the premium holographic finish

## Photography Style
- Lighting: soft studio key lighting with secondary colored rim lights to catch the iridescent texture
- Depth of Field: shallow (f/2.8) to isolate the product texture
- Camera Parameter Reference: ISO 100, 85mm Prime Lens, Shutter 1/125

## Quality Requirements
- Resolution: 8K
- Style: high-end technology lifestyle aesthetic
- Realism: hyper-realistic with accurate material physics
blueprint.product_summary: A sleek biodegradable iPhone case with an iridescent liquid metal surface and futuristic holographic finish.

per_plan_adaptations.adaptation_summary: Place the headline in the top-left safe zone, keep the support copy below it, and center the short body line at the bottom without covering the product.
